examples: The man filled the manger with hay.
Finally, not finding anything else in the manger, he tasted the hay.
Someone brought a moppet and put it on the haulm in the cardboard manger.
Santa Santa said, oh, little elf, little elf, come, sing "Away in a Manger" for us.
Rob Tarkoff, Senior Vice President and General Manger, Digital Enterprise Solutions, Adobe Systems, Inc.
